# 3Parusa — Sailing Yacht Tours

> 3Parusa offers authored sailing yacht trips (VIP catamarans) to more than 20 countries worldwide.

## About
3Parusa runs guided yacht tours with captain Stas Kochukov (IYT/ICC licensed, 20,000+ nautical miles). Off-the-beaten-path routes, comfortable VIP catamarans, all-inclusive.

## Destinations
Turkey, Greece, Italy, Croatia, Spain (Ibiza), Canary Islands, Seychelles, Thailand, Cuba, Mexico, Caribbean.

## Formats
Group yacht tours (3–7 days and 7+ days), family tours, corporate getaways and business retreats under sail, gift certificates (from €1000).

## What's included
Catamaran accommodation (4 DBL cabins), authored route, captain, linen, Wi-Fi, transfers, 24/7 support.

## Contact
Phone/WhatsApp: +7 910 465-14-20 · Email: staskochukov@gmail.com · Telegram: https://t.me/Tri_parusa
Russian version: https://3parusa.ru · English version: https://3parusa.com
